risks.title: Fix only handles 'file:' URI prefix; underlying basePath comparison still fragile on edge OSes
risks.mitigation: Stub option 2 (path.relative-based) is more robust; implementer should pick option 2 if option 1 leaves edge cases. Unit test fixture must include all four shape combos: abs-Win+rel-POSIX, abs-POSIX+rel-POSIX, file:abs-Win+rel-POSIX, file:abs-POSIX+rel-POSIX.

risks.title: Invariant test tolerance ±10% might mask a smaller real divergence
risks.mitigation: Stub explicitly sets ±10% per ORCHESTRATOR Path A constraint; do NOT renegotiate. The dynamic equality is the canonical signal.

risks.title: E2E smoke re-run requires Ollama up; may not be available at CI time
risks.mitigation: E2E re-verification is local-only (requires CODEREF_LLM_PROVIDER=ollama). The unit + invariant tests in CI provide static coverage; dynamic check belongs in implementer's manual smoke.

risks.title: Accidentally touching IndexingResult shape or adding SkipReason value
risks.mitigation: Hard constraint enforced by no-phase-8-docs-leak boundary spirit (keeping Phase 7 closeout pristine). PR review scope: diff must be confined to normalizeChunkFile + tests.

decision_records.decision: Fix shape selection (option 1 file:-prefix-peel vs option 2 path.relative vs option 3 dual-key) is implementer's call
decision_records.rationale: Stub explicitly leaves this open. Implementer should pick the option that survives all 4 shape combos (abs-Win, abs-POSIX, file:abs-Win, file:abs-POSIX) on the unit-test fixture and minimizes orchestrator state churn.
ORCHESTRATOR Path A constraint locked at Phase 7 close. Do not renegotiate.

decision_records.decision: AC-09 dynamic alignment is verified manually via E2E smoke, not in CI
decision_records.rationale: CI doesn't run Ollama. Unit + invariant tests cover the structural fix; dynamic equality is the implementer's halt-gate signal before close.
